reviews.reviewer_notes: Accepted: numeric mu_EF values and parenthesized systematic uncertainties are transcribed from arXiv:2512.19382v2 PDF/TeX Table I.

reviews.audit_question: Is the observation of [@shared_dfpt_lambda_error_model] reliable under the stated conditions?
reviews.reviewer_notes: Accepted: Table II gives lambda values but no lambda error bars; the package explicitly marks lambda uncertainty as a shared DFPT systematic model.

reviews.audit_question: Is the observation of [@al_arxiv_table_row] reliable under the stated conditions?
reviews.reviewer_notes: Accepted: Al fcc row is transcribed from arXiv:2512.19382v2 PDF/TeX Table II.

reviews.audit_question: Is the observation of [@li_arxiv_table_row] reliable under the stated conditions?
reviews.reviewer_notes: Accepted: Li 9R row is transcribed from arXiv:2512.19382v2 PDF/TeX Table II, with separate lattice-structure uncertainty modeled elsewhere.

reviews.audit_question: Is the observation of [@zn_arxiv_table_row] reliable under the stated conditions?
reviews.reviewer_notes: Accepted: Zn hcp row is transcribed from arXiv:2512.19382v2 PDF/TeX Table II.

reviews.audit_question: Is the computation of [@al_lambda_input] correctly implemented?
reviews.reviewer_notes: Accepted: deterministic compute from the Al Table II lambda value and the shared DFPT fractional uncertainty model; covered by tests.

reviews.audit_question: Is the computation of [@al_mu_star_input] correctly implemented?
reviews.reviewer_notes: Accepted: deterministic interpolation of Table I mu_EF followed by BTS running using the Al Table II parameters; covered by tests.

reviews.audit_question: Is the computation of [@li_lambda_input] correctly implemented?
reviews.reviewer_notes: Accepted: deterministic compute from the Li 9R Table II lambda value and the shared DFPT fractional uncertainty model; covered by tests.

reviews.audit_question: Is the computation of [@li_mu_star_input] correctly implemented?
reviews.reviewer_notes: Accepted: deterministic interpolation of Table I mu_EF followed by BTS running using the Li 9R Table II parameters; covered by tests.

reviews.audit_question: Is the computation of [@zn_lambda_input] correctly implemented?
reviews.reviewer_notes: Accepted: deterministic compute from the Zn Table II lambda value and the shared DFPT fractional uncertainty model; covered by tests.

reviews.audit_question: Is the computation of [@zn_mu_star_input] correctly implemented?
reviews.reviewer_notes: Accepted: deterministic interpolation of Table I mu_EF followed by BTS running using the Zn Table II parameters; covered by tests.

reviews.audit_question: Is the observation of [@tolmachev_log_mu_star_error_model] reliable under the stated conditions?
reviews.reviewer_notes: Accepted: the mu* uncertainty should include an order-one Tolmachev-log cutoff-matching systematic, giving Delta mu* approximately (mu*)^2 Delta log in addition to Table I propagation.

reviews.audit_question: Is the computation of [@al_mu_star_input] correctly implemented?
reviews.reviewer_notes: Accepted: deterministic Table I interpolation, BTS running, and Tolmachev-log uncertainty propagation are covered by tests.

reviews.audit_question: Is the computation of [@li_mu_star_input] correctly implemented?
reviews.reviewer_notes: Accepted: deterministic Table I interpolation, BTS running, and Tolmachev-log uncertainty propagation are covered by tests; this raises Li mu* uncertainty to 0.0375.

reviews.audit_question: Is the computation of [@zn_mu_star_input] correctly implemented?
reviews.reviewer_notes: Accepted: deterministic Table I interpolation, BTS running, and Tolmachev-log uncertainty propagation are covered by tests.

reviews.audit_question: Do the listed premises suffice to establish [@li_effective_coupling_error_bounded]?
reviews.reviewer_notes: Accepted: lambda uncertainty is already carried by the upstream shared DFPT lambda input model, so the Li effective-coupling uncertainty warrant should depend on computed g and the explicit Li lattice assumption, not an additional lambda-bound claim.

reviews.audit_question: Do the listed premises suffice to establish [@tc_al_predicted]?
reviews.reviewer_notes: Accepted: Al Tc prediction now uses the ab initio workflow and computed effective coupling; lambda and mu* uncertainty enter through the effective-coupling inputs.

reviews.audit_question: Do the listed premises suffice to establish [@tc_zn_predicted]?
reviews.reviewer_notes: Accepted: Zn Tc prediction now uses the ab initio workflow and computed effective coupling; lambda and mu* uncertainty enter through the effective-coupling inputs.

reviews.audit_question: Do the listed premises suffice to establish [@tc_li_predicted]?
reviews.reviewer_notes: Accepted: Li Tc prediction now rests on the ab initio workflow, explicit low-temperature lattice assumption, computed effective coupling, and g-uncertainty warrant. The separate lambda-bound claim was redundant with the shared DFPT lambda input model.
